# kCGImagePropertyJFIFDictionary

**Global Variable**

A dictionary of key-value pairs for an image that uses JPEG File Interchange Format (JFIF).

## Declaration

```swift
let kCGImagePropertyJFIFDictionary: CFString
```

## Discussion

For more information about the available metadata keys, see [doc://com.apple.imageio/documentation/ImageIO/jfif-image-properties].
title: kCGImagePropertyJFIFDictionary
